subject: resnet8-cifar10-fp32
notes: Full CIFAR-10 test set (10000 images, 1000/class), matches docs/record_format.md's 10,000-record count. Images from the uoft-cs/cifar10 HF Parquet mirror (lossless PNG bytes) -- see module docstring for why a JPEG mirror was rejected (measured ~13-point accuracy hit from lossy re-compression on this 32x32-input model). MLPerf Tiny reference reports ~87.0% top-1 on its own 200-sample perf subset; quality target 85%+ top-1 on the full test set.
